name: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
description: Per-user multi-factor authentication for Jellyfin: TOTP authenticator enrollment with single-use recovery codes, enforced at sign-in for enrolled users.
overview: Per-user TOTP multi-factor authentication with recovery codes for Jellyfin.

versions.changelog:
## v1.0.4

### Changes
- cached injection fix + recovery code security improved

## v1.0.2

### Changes
- security fix
- Stop tracking .claude/settings.local.json
- @ Stop tracking .claude/settings.local.json
- deleted old security policy
- updated logo
- readme update + added logo
- readme update

v1.0.1 — Per-user TOTP authentication with single-use recovery codes, enforced at sign-in. One unified web login: the standard Jellyfin sign-in page gains the 2FA code field, and native login endpoints are refused before a session token is minted for protected users, with a SessionStarted failsafe for other paths. Configurable enforcement scope (Optional / Admins / Everyone), optional Quick Connect for enrolled users, and an admin panel to view enrollment, review the audit log, and reset a locked-out user. Targets Jellyfin 10.10.7 (ABI 10.10.0.0, .NET 8).
